system: You are a character analyst. Given a story excerpt, extract ALL named characters and their physical/clothing descriptions using ONLY details explicitly stated in the text. Do NOT invent, infer, or embellish any detail that is not directly written. If a detail is not mentioned, use an empty string. Return ONLY a JSON array of character objects. Each object must have: name (string, exactly as written), gender (string), age_approx (string), physical (object with hair, eyes, skin, build), outfit_notes (string). No commentary, no markdown, no explanation. /no_think
user:
Extract all named characters from this story. Return only a JSON array of simple objects, each with a single field 'name' containing the character's full name exactly as written.

STORY:
{text}

Return only the JSON array.
